title: EGLUTierList
description: EGLUTierTagger For Showing Tiers in game
body:
# EGLU TierTagger – See Every Player’s PvP Tier Instantly

A lightweight, client-side only mod that displays EGLU Tier List ranks directly above player nametags and in the tab list — in real time.
Automatically syncs with the official EGLU API (eglutierlist.top) with smart persistent caching. Works on any server — no server-side installation required.

✨ Features

Real-time tier display above heads and in the tab list
Supports all 8 EGLU PvP gamemodes:
Nethpot • Potion • Mace • SMP • Axe • UHC • Sword • Crystal
Multiple display modes: selected gamemode, highest tier only, or show all tiers
Modern custom font rendering for clean, high-quality tier visuals
Smart API sync with offline cache fallback
Fully functional offline after first successful load
Configurable display: tiers, regions, gamemodes, icons, refresh timing & more
Works with Feather Client and all major Fabric clients

⚙️ v1.1.0 Improvements

Offline Cache System — Tier data saves locally and works without internet
Improved Performance — Faster loading with persistent cache
Better Reliability — Automatically falls back to cached data if API is unavailable

⌨️ Default Keybinds

U — Open config GUI
G — Cycle gamemode display
R — Refresh tier data
Y — Hide / Show all tiers

🧩 Commands

/etl — View your tiers
/etl <player> — View another player’s tiers
/etl_cache info — Check cache status
/etl_cache clear — Clear offline cache

🛠 Technical
TAJUL — Founder & Lead Developer
Client-side only — safe on every server
Minecraft 1.21+
Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
Requires Fabric API
Java 21+
MIT License
